column1: # tests/gate-coverage-exempt.tsv — explicit allowlist for tests/test-*.sh files that are NOT
# currently wired into tests/herd.bats (the authoritative merge-gate test runner).
# The gate-coverage drift guard (scripts/herd/gate-coverage-lint.sh, HERD-292) reds when a
# tests/test-*.sh exists but is neither referenced in tests/herd.bats nor listed here.
# Every row is a bare test filename (no path, no comment inline).
# Convention: add a row here ONLY when there is a known reason the test cannot yet be wired
# (e.g. flaky on CI, depends on live env, or waiting on a follow-up PR to wire it properly).
# Prefer wiring the test directly in herd.bats over adding an exemption.
# Populated by HERD-292 with tests that pre-existed the guard; a follow-up will wire them.
